boundary: MUST items are active hard rules to enforce, not context to weigh. SHOULD and CONTEXT contain active guidance and assertions. PROVISIONAL items are non-active, unconfirmed candidates and never carry MUST, SHOULD, CONTEXT, MISSING, or compliance authority. Surface CONFLICT items instead of silently resolving them.
